Validation Rules: Must be valid image file path if set; input via FileDropInput.vue component (drag-drop or click). Fullscreen drop target is context-dependent: watermark when no aspect_convert, bg_image when aspect_convert I-mode, disabled when aspect_convert T/B-mode

Field Name: <!-- v2.1.0-CHANGE: Phase 3.5.1 更新 speed 验证范围为 0.25-4 -->

Validation Rules: Range: 0.25-4.0 (hard limit). Values outside 0.5-2.0 may cause audio-video desync. Empty = original

Field Name: <!-- v2.1.0-CHANGE: Phase 3 新增音频归一化与横竖屏转换字段 -->

Validation Rules: Applies FFmpeg loudnorm filter to audio stream. Exclusive with simple volume adjustment
Range: -70 to -5. Default -16 follows EBU R128 standard
Range: 1 to 20. Default 11 for normal content
Values: H2V-I (horizontal-to-vertical with image bg), H2V-T (with blurred video bg), H2V-B (black padding), V2H-I, V2H-T, V2H-B. Empty = no conversion

column8: FFmpeg uses ':' internally. Required when aspect_convert is set"

Description: Background image path for I-mode aspect conversion,Required for H2V-I and V2H-I modes. Input via FileDropInput component (drag-drop or click). Accepts: .png
